descriptionShort: Moncton Hawks players embrace underdog status before AHL playoff series against St. John's Maple Leafs.
descriptionLong: Captain Rob Murray and coach Rob Laird of the Moncton Hawks reject the underdog label as they prepare for a best-of-seven Atlantic Division semifinal playoff series against the St. John's Maple Leafs in the American Hockey League. The Hawks, finishing fourth in a competitive division, face the heavily favored Leafs beginning April 14, 1993 in Halifax due to a municipal workers' strike in St. John's.
